rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes when bounds are concrete or visible.
Use visible feature names and declared constants in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Formulate range assumptions and guarantees using visible identifiers and explicit bounds.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use boolean helper declarations for range checks: eq var : bool = x >= min and x <= max.
Place annex agree blocks in valid component type or implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type contracts.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in type-level contracts.
